Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM Video-conferencing:

Assistant Tax Collector Attorney, Debra D. Lew (Email: debra.lew@sfgov.org), of the City and County of San Francisco Office of the Treasurer & Tax Collector - Legal Section (Tel: 415.554.7888) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

On Calendar:
PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Court repeats the tentative ruling for Ms. Lew, who arrived after the matter was called.

PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com.
